nasb.text: His kinsmen by their families, in the genealogy of their generations, were Jeiel the chief, then Zechariah

esv.text: And his kinsmen by their clans, when the genealogy of their generations was recorded: the chief, Jeiel, and Zechariah,

cnv.text: 他的兄弟按著家族歷代的譜系記載作首領的，是耶利、撒迦利雅和比拉。

ccb.text: 按家谱记载，他做族长的亲族是耶利、撒迦利雅和比拉。
